text.title: Instagram Shopping and Collection Ads
text.summary: API calls for shopping creatives with product tags and collection ad format for Instagram.

rule.statement: Before creating shopping ads, connect the Instagram Business Account to Business Manager and verify that the product catalog is live in Commerce Manager.
rule.rationale: Shopping creative API calls require a valid product_set_id and instagram_actor_id; missing either returns an API error that blocks the entire campaign launch.

list.item: Connect Instagram Business Account to Business Manager
Set up Product Catalog in Facebook Commerce Manager
Create Ad Set with Instagram placements only

example.note: Collection ads require a hero image plus 3-4 product thumbnails pulled from the catalog.
